poll Gong/Grain since last run

ATOMIC dedup claim (MERGE)
fingerprint = hash(emails + start~5min)
rows_affected = 1 ?

Switch: classify
participant domains vs OWN_DOMAINS

emails in EXEC_LIST or title pattern

span.p:
Gong API: move to RESTRICTED workspace
Grain-only: move file to restricted Drive,
delete from shared Grain + admin Slack

BigQuery insert:
fact_call + child tables + workflow_run

span.p:
HTTP: Claude Messages API
(map-reduce if long transcript)
strict JSON: summary, next_steps, sentiment,
objections[cat], competitors[], action_items,
MEDDPICC, match_hints, confidence

rep picks account/opp

identified account (auto)

net-new prospect? rep confirms create

create Call_Summary__c (Acct/Contact/Opp)
+ completed Task + Opp.NextStep / LastCallDate
(no auto stage change)

SF 'Needs Review' (data not lost)
+ BigQuery match_status=unresolved
